name: readyflight
description: An Electron application with React and TypeScript
author: example.com

scripts.lint: bun run lint:backend && bun run lint:electron && bun run lint:frontend
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:libs && bun run typecheck:backend && bun run typecheck:electron && bun run typecheck:frontend
scripts.build:sim: cd sim && docker build --platform linux/amd64 -t readyflight-sim .
scripts.start:sim:plane: docker run -it --rm --platform linux/amd64 -p 14550:14550 -p 5760:5760 --network=host readyflight-sim python3 Tools/autotest/sim_vehicle.py -v ArduPlane --out=udp:127.0.0.1:14550
scripts.start:sim:copter: docker run -it --rm --platform linux/amd64 -p 14550:14550 -p 5760:5760 --network=host readyflight-sim python3 Tools/autotest/sim_vehicle.py -v ArduCopter --out=udp:127.0.0.1:14550
scripts.start:sim:plane:win: docker run -it --rm --platform linux/amd64 -p 14550:14550 -p 5760:5760 readyflight-sim python3 Tools/autotest/sim_vehicle.py -v ArduPlane --out=host.docker.internal:14550
scripts.start:sim:copter:win: docker run -it --rm --platform linux/amd64 -p 14550:14550 -p 5760:5760 readyflight-sim python3 Tools/autotest/sim_vehicle.py -v ArduCopter --out=host.docker.internal:14550
